query_normalized: asymptotic behavior of random matrix eigenvalues with sparse perturbations mathematics
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (a) and (d) as it investigates the asymptotic behavior of random matrix eigenvalues (specifically the Tracy-Widom distribution at the spectral edge), which is the core mechanism the user is asking about, even though the specific perturbation model (elliptical data) differs from the user's "sparse perturbations" specification.
